query: Using the chronological frame sequence around 217s-222s and the transcript around 212s-231s, identify the exact black piece being moved on the final move immediately before the reactions 'A checkmate?' / 'A checkmate.' Do not answer from piece presence or dialogue mention alone. Compare before/during/after frames, determine which piece is in motion or has just changed square, state whether that move is the mating move, and map the result to one of: bishop, knight, pawn, queen, rook.

segments.text: What are we gonna do? Going there? Oh, no, you can't. Oh, you're trying to be slick. You're trying to use your brain. Of course I am. No, I can't do that, bro. You almost fell for it. I actually almost did. Go in and go in. Thanks, Mike. What kind of cheerleading crap is this, man? I got a cheerleader here. That's right. You don't have one, but she does. Thank you. Now we go here. What are we gonna do now? Oh, I can take that, too. That was free, so I gotta get that out of there.
But you know what's also free? Yeah, another queen. A checkmate. Oh! Oh! A checkmate? A checkmate. Drew, I'm still on your side. And a beautiful one. Oh! Oh!
She got this thing! She got it! It is what it is! It is what it is! That was almost two in one thing. Thank you! Wow! Oh my gosh!
